business.name: D & R Electrical Services
business.tagline: When you need it done right the first time

hero.headline: The owner *still answers* the phone
hero.subheadline: Home inspectors only recommend us to their customers. That says everything you need to know about our work.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every wire, outlet, and panel
services_section.subheading: From kitchen upgrades to whole house rewiring, we handle it all

services.title: Kitchen Lighting & Outlets
services.description: Can lights, under-cabinet lighting, and GFCI outlets. We'll stay within estimate and clean up after ourselves.

services.title: Panel Upgrades & Breakers
services.description: Whole house circuit breaker installation explained in terms you'll actually understand before we start.

services.title: Home Electrical Repairs
services.description: From flickering lights to dead outlets, we fix what's broken and explain what caused it.

services.title: New Home Electrical Setup
services.description: Complete electrical systems for new homeowners who want peace of mind from certified work.

about.heading: Serving Fort Myers for over two decades
about.body: We're the electrical contractor that home inspectors recommend to their customers. When you call, the owner picks up. When we give you a quote, we stick to it. When we finish the job, we clean up. That's just how we've always done business in Southwest Florida.

reviews.name: Larry H.
reviews.text: Very knowledgeable crew that worked efficiently on my kitchen can lighting. Stayed within estimate and cleaned up perfectly.

reviews.name: Mary S.
reviews.text: As a home inspector, I only recommend D & R to my customers. They're fast, courteous, and supremely knowledgeable.

reviews.name: Derek M.
reviews.text: They explained our whole house circuit breaker setup in terms I could understand before starting. Professional work.

reviews.name: Diane H.
reviews.text: We've used them for 2 years since buying our home. Friendly technicians and the peace of mind of certified work.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Southwest Florida
service_areas.subheading: Fast response times throughout Lee County

cta.heading: Ready to get it done right?
cta.body: Call now and talk directly to the owner. We'll give you a straight quote and timeline — no runaround, no surprises.
